title: Breaks bulk carts
incident: Checkout total is off by a cent on multi-item carts
rootCause: The 5% loyalty discount is floored on each line, so a fractional cent is dropped per line and the error compounds as the cart grows.
diff: + const sub = items.reduce((s, line) => s + line, 0);
reason: The patch fixes the reported bug, but a regression guard now fails (bulk cart 6 x $10.00 = $57.00): it breaks adjacent behaviour.

confidenceFactors.label: reproduction confirmed
confidenceFactors.note: the guard fails on the buggy code

confidenceFactors.label: guard discriminates
confidenceFactors.note: the guard passes on the patch

confidenceFactors.label: mutation coverage
confidenceFactors.note: the guard suite killed 6 of 8 mutants

signals.label: existing suite green on the bug
existing suite green on the patch
